description:
You are a video game designer building documentation for your indie game project. Using TiddlyWiki at http://localhost:8080, create a comprehensive Game Design Document (GDD) for the game 'Echoes of the Void'. Create the following six tiddlers, each tagged with 'GDD' and 'EchoesOfTheVoid', containing at least 80 words of substantive content, and including at least one table and one wikilink to another tiddler in the set:

1. 'Echoes of the Void - GDD Hub': Include a game concept overview (genre, setting, target audience) and a table of all GDD sections (columns: Section, Description, Status).
2. 'Echoes of the Void - Core Mechanics': Describe the core gameplay loop and include a table comparing at least three distinct mechanics (columns: Mechanic, Description, Player Goal, Challenge Level).
3. 'Echoes of the Void - Character Roster': List at least three major characters with a table (columns: Name, Role, Special Ability, Weakness, Brief Backstory).
4. 'Echoes of the Void - World Design': Describe the game world and include a table of at least three distinct areas or levels (columns: Area, Description, Primary Enemies, Key Items).
5. 'Echoes of the Void - Story and Narrative': Describe the story premise and include a table of story acts/beats (columns: Act, Title, Summary, Key Events).
6. 'Echoes of the Void - Technical Requirements': Cover target platforms, engine, and performance specs with a table (columns: Requirement, Minimum Spec, Recommended Spec).

Ensure all tiddlers use appropriate TiddlyWiki headings and formatting. No login is required.

required_tiddlers: Echoes of the Void - GDD Hub
Echoes of the Void - Core Mechanics
Echoes of the Void - Character Roster
Echoes of the Void - World Design
Echoes of the Void - Story and Narrative
Echoes of the Void - Technical Requirements
